channel.title: Taiwan Daily Insider
channel.description: Your go-to podcast for staying on top of the news that truly matters to foreign professionals, expats, and Gold Card holders right here in Taiwan. Fully automated utilizing AI.
channel.itunes:author: Eric Chi

item.title: Taiwan Daily Insider - 2026-04-11
item.description: Good morning, good afternoon, or good evening, wherever you are tuning in from! Welcome to Taiwan Daily Insider, your essential guide to navigating the pulse of Taiwan. I’m your host, and today is Saturday, April 11, 2026. Lets dive into the stories making headlines and shaping conversations across the island.We kick things off today with some significant financial news that will undoubtedly catch the eye of every expat and professional here. The New Taiwan Dollar, or NTD, is on an absolutely epic surge! Following a remarkable 3.07% jump earlier this month, the NTD continued its powerful ascent this morning, opening at 30.91 against the US Dollar. Within a mere 15 minutes, it had already surged by over one NTD, briefly touching the 29 NTD mark. This kind of rapid appreciation is something we havent seen in a while, reflecting strong foreign capital inflows and robust export performance.Now, what does this mean for you? If youre earning in NTD, your purchasing power for imported goods and international travel just got a significant boost. For those of you receiving remittances from abroad in US Dollars, you might find your local spending power slightly diminished, but conversely, if youre sending money *out* of Taiwan, your NTD will go further. This strong NTD is often a signal of confidence in Taiwans economic fundamentals, but it also presents challenges for some of Taiwans export-oriented industries. We’ll be keeping a close eye on whether the Central Bank steps in with any measures to stabilize the currency in the coming days.

item.title: Taiwan Daily Insider - 2026-04-12
item.description: Good morning, good afternoon, or good evening, wherever you are tuning in from! Welcome to the Taiwan Daily Insider, your essential daily briefing for foreign professionals, expats, and Gold Card holders right here in Taiwan. Im your host, and today is Saturday, April 12, 2026.Weve got a packed show for you today, diving deep into Taiwans booming economy, critical geopolitical developments, and some intriguing local social media buzz. If youre invested in Taiwans future, literally and figuratively, youll want to stick around.Lets kick things off with a major economic headline thats probably already caught your eye: the New Taiwan Dollar, or NTD, is on an absolute tear! This morning, the NTD continued its epic surge, once again soaring by over one New Taiwan Dollar against the US dollar in early trading, briefly hitting the 29 NTD to 1 US dollar mark. This comes after an astonishing 3.07% single-day appreciation just a couple of days ago. The Taipei foreign exchange market saw the NTD open at 30.91 against the US dollar, immediately strengthening by over 1.5 NTD cents, and then quickly climbing past the 30.25 mark, before pushing even higher.

item.title: Taiwan Daily Insider - 2026-04-13
item.description: Good morning, afternoon, or evening, wherever you are tuning in from! This is your host, [Host Name - *I will use a placeholder as no name was provided, assuming the TTS will just read the script without needing a specific host name*], and welcome back to the Taiwan Daily Insider. Your essential daily briefing for foreign professionals, expats, and Gold Card holders navigating the vibrant landscape of Taiwan.Today is Saturday, April 12, 2026. Lets dive into the stories making waves across the island and beyond.Were kicking things off with some significant economic news thats sure to catch the attention of anyone dealing with currency exchange. The New Taiwan Dollar, or NTD, is on an absolute tear! Following an epic surge earlier in the week, where it jumped over three percent in a single day, the NTD continued its powerful ascent this morning. It opened at 30.91 against the US Dollar and, within just fifteen minutes, saw its value appreciate by more than one full New Taiwan Dollar, briefly touching the 29 NTD mark. This kind of rapid appreciation is quite remarkable and speaks volumes about the current strength of Taiwans economy and its appeal to foreign capital. For many of you, this means your foreign currency earnings will stretch a bit further when converted, but it also impacts export competitiveness for local businesses. Analysts are pointing to robust export performance, particularly in the tech sector, coupled with sustained foreign investment inflows, as key drivers. The Central Bank will undoubtedly be watching this closely, as such rapid movements can have broader implications for monetary policy and inflation. Well keep you updated on how this develops, but for now, its a testament to the islands economic resilience.

item.title: Taiwan Daily Insider - 2026-04-14
item.description: Welcome to Taiwan Daily Insider, your essential guide to whats happening on the island. Im your host, and today is April 13, 2026. Weve got a packed agenda for you, covering everything from the surging New Taiwan Dollar and its implications for your wallet, to major shifts in the semiconductor power grid, and of course, a deep dive into the latest on the Tai-ex. Lets dive right in.We kick things off today with some truly remarkable news on the currency front. The New Taiwan Dollar, or NTD, is continuing its epic ascent, showing no signs of slowing down. After a staggering 3.07% surge just two days ago, a move that sent ripples through global currency markets, the NTD opened today at 30.91 against the US Dollar. But that wasnt the end of the story. Within a mere fifteen minutes of trading, we saw an even more aggressive appreciation, with the currency gaining over one full New Taiwan Dollar, flashing past the 29-dollar mark at one point, before settling strongly later in the day around the 30.25 level. This isnt just a minor fluctuation; were talking about a significant, sustained upward trend thats catching the eye of global investors and economists alike.So, whats driving this incredible strength? A confluence of factors, primarily Taiwans robust export performance, particularly in the high-tech sector, continues to bring in substantial foreign currency. Furthermore, the massive inflow of foreign investment into the Tai-ex, which well discuss shortly, also bolsters demand for the local currency. The Central Banks measured approach to intervention also suggests a comfort with the NTDs appreciation, reflecting strong confidence in Taiwans economic fundamentals. For foreign professionals, expats, and businesses operating here, this continued strength of the NTD has considerable implications. It means your purchasing power for local goods and services is slightly diminished if youre earning in foreign currency, but it also makes imports cheaper. For those remitting funds back home, its a favorable situation. Overall, it signals a very healthy and dynamic economy, but its certainly a trend to keep a close eye on for financial planning.

item.title: Taiwan Daily Insider - 2026-04-15
item.description: Welcome to Taiwan Daily Insider, your daily dose of all things Taiwan. Today is April 14, 2026. Im your host, and weve got a packed show for you, diving deep into the economic currents, political developments, and a glimpse into whats buzzing across the island.Lets kick things off with a major economic update thats certainly impacting your wallets and business forecasts: the New Taiwan Dollar. The NTD is on an absolute tear, continuing its epic rally. After a dramatic 3.07% surge just a couple of days ago, the currency opened strong today at 30.91 against the US Dollar. But it didnt stop there. Within the first fifteen minutes of trading, the NTD saw an incredible appreciation of over one New Taiwan Dollar, briefly flashing past the 29 mark before settling around 30.25. This kind of rapid appreciation is significant. For foreign professionals and expats, a stronger NTD means your purchasing power for imported goods and services potentially increases, and if youre earning in NTD, your remittances abroad might stretch a little further. However, for businesses involved in exports, this can also mean tighter margins. Its a dynamic situation that well continue to monitor closely, as it reflects strong capital inflows and a robust economic outlook for Taiwan.Speaking of robust, lets turn to the Taiwan Stock Exchange, the TAIEX, which continues its impressive run. The market saw another day of record highs, largely propelled by the semiconductor giant, TSMC, or Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company. TSMCs shares soared to a new all-time high of 2055 New Taiwan Dollars. This isnt just a win for TSMC; its a powerful indicator of the broader markets confidence, especially in Taiwans pivotal role in the global tech supply chain. The TAIEXs overall ascent today was also fueled by strong performances in related sectors. We saw significant gains in optical components, robotics, and Copper Clad Laminate, or CCL, which is a key material for printed circuit boards. These sectors are often seen as bellwethers for future tech trends, particularly with the surging demand for AI infrastructure.
